# QFusion UK

> QFusion UK is a queue management and customer flow platform for NHS trusts, banks, local councils and public services across the United Kingdom — covering online appointments, digital ticketing, reception check-in, live displays and customer feedback.

QFusion UK is delivered by Interactive Displays UK. The platform helps UK organisations cut wait times, manage visitor flow across multiple sites, and report on service performance from a single cloud dashboard.

## Pages

- [Home](/): QFusion UK overview, features, industries served, reseller programme and demo booking.

## Visitor Journey (Industries)

- [Healthcare & NHS](/visitor-journey/healthcare): Queue management and patient flow for NHS trusts, hospitals and GP surgeries.
- [Retail](/visitor-journey/retail): Customer flow and service desk queuing for UK retail.
- [Public Sector & Councils](/visitor-journey/public-sector): Visitor management for UK local councils and public services.
- [Finance & Banking](/visitor-journey/finance): Branch queuing and appointment booking for UK banks.
- [Corporate](/visitor-journey/corporate): Reception and visitor management for corporate offices.

## Visitor Services (Product Modules)

- [Queue Management](/visitor-services/queue-management): Virtual and physical queue management with live displays.
- [Customer Counting](/visitor-services/customer-counting): People counting and footfall analytics.
- [Satisfaction Survey](/visitor-services/satisfaction-survey): Real-time customer feedback collection.
- [Corporate Reception](/visitor-services/corporate-reception): Visitor check-in and reception management.
- [Online Appointments](/visitor-services/online-appointments): Self-service appointment booking.

## Optional

- [Reseller Programme](/#resellers): Become a QFusion UK reseller — for digital signage, ICT and traditional signage companies.
- [Book a Demo](/#demo): Request a 20-minute tailored demo.
